tweet.text: RIP Coach Joe D. Great coach and even better man. Helped me a lot in my time in baltimore.

Kids: Stay in school. Pursue your passions relentlessly. Practice good spending habits. Help others but most importantly do what’s right for YOU. The day you find your own voice is the day you realize your purpose and that’s finding peace in this world. That’s my Ted talk
RT @Justin_DeShon: 🚨WELCOME THE NEWEST MEMBER OF THE LEGACY WALL🚨 Jaylen McCollough of the Los Angeles Rams‼️ @Jay_Mccollough2 Excited to…

I’m live on Twitch - Watch me at https://t.co/BSJC9OWdVI
Live streaming Prominence Poker on PS5
